page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web application for user-provided sequences. It can predict protein sequences encoded by an input flu sequence and produce a feature table that can be used for sequence submission to GenBank.
page_metadata.bioschemas__name: NCBI Influenza Virus Sequence Annotation Tool
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web application for user-provided sequences. It can predict protein sequences encoded by an input flu sequence and produce a feature table that can be used for sequence submission to GenBank.
